title: Claude Fable 5 sets a fluid simulation to Beethoven
summary: Claude Fable 5 generated both a fluid simulation algorithm and an EDM remix of Beethoven using code, synchronizing the visual motion to the musical beat. The model produced music without prior exposure to audio data.
writeup: The video shows Claude Fable 5 generating a fluid simulation algorithm and an EDM remix of Beethoven entirely through code, with the visual motion synchronized to the musical beat. The notable point is that the model produced the music without prior exposure to audio data, building it from code rather than learned sound. The demonstration spans code generation, physics simulation, and generative output in a single piece.
